title: BLE-Modpack
description: Explore Minecraft 1.12.1 with the BLE-Modpack! Built around the Create Mod, this pack lets you craft complex machines in survival mode with custom recipes.
body:
# BLE-Modpack

Experience Minecraft 1.12.1 in an entirely new way with our specially crafted BLE-Modpack! This modpack revolves entirely around the Create Mod, allowing you to build impressive machines and mechanical systems in survival mode. Everything you need to revolutionize your Minecraft world with clever constructions and automated processes is here.

### Features:

- Create Mod: The heart of the modpack. Use gears, belts, wheels, and other mechanical components to create complex machines and production chains – all in survival mode.

- Custom Crafting Recipes: All items and resources can be crafted using specially designed recipes that perfectly complement the Create Mod.

- Survival Mode Focus: Every element and challenge is designed to test your survival skills and creativity. Build machines to help you gather resources, combat enemies, and ensure your survival.

- Exploration and Discovery: Explore the endless possibilities of the Create Mod and learn how to use machines efficiently and creatively.


### Why BLE-Modpack?

- Comprehensive Survival Experience: Whether you're a seasoned engineer or a curious beginner, the BLE-Modpack offers a rich and challenging survival experience.

- Technical Innovation: Take your Minecraft world to the next level with advanced machines and automation.

- Regular Updates: We ensure that the modpack is regularly updated to provide you with new content and improvements.

**_Get ready for an epic survival adventure filled with machines and innovation. Download the BLE-Modpack today and discover how creative and inventive you can be in survival mode!_**

## Have fun playing and creating!


### Mods outside from Modrinth Special Thanks
